```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Geometric distribution.
# Packages
library(ggplot2)

# Plot
ggplot2::ggplot(data.frame(x = c(0, 15)), aes(x)) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dgeom, args = list(prob = 0.2), geom = "col",
    aes(fill = "p=0.2"), alpha = 0.7, n = 16
  ) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dgeom, args = list(prob = 0.5), geom = "col",
    aes(fill = "p=0.5"), alpha = 0.7, n = 16
  ) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dgeom, args = list(prob = 0.8), geom = "col",
    aes(fill = "p=0.8"), alpha = 0.7, n = 16
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(fill = "Parameters") +
  ggplot2::ylab("Probability") +
  ggplot2::xlab("x") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
